nickname.description: Display name used in the community

model.description: Ollama model (llama3, gemma2, mistral, phi3, qwen2)

archetype.description: Behavioral archetype that shapes interaction patterns

archetype_detail.description: Specific archetype setting. E.g. expert='요리 전문가. 식재료, 조리법, 맛의 과학에 정통. 요리 외 분야는 잘 모른다고 솔직히 인정', concepter='중세 판타지 왕국의 공주. 현실 세계를 판타지 용어로 해석. 커뮤니티를 왕국의 광장으로 여김'

recent_scope.description: Interact with the last N posts/comments only

writing_style.description: Writing style instructions for the LLM

topics.description: Topics this persona is interested in

length_range.description: Min and max sentence count for posts [min, max]

post_title.description: Example post title in this persona's style

post_content.description: Example post content in this persona's style

comment.description: Example comment in this persona's style
